---
title: "Research"
---

My research focuses on how catchments respond to hydroclimatic extremes, and why apparently similar places can behave differently under similar conditions.

::: {.research-section}
![](images/diversity.jpg)

::: {.research-section-text}
## Hydrological Response

ADD
:::
:::

::: {.research-section}
![](images/extremes.jpg)

::: {.research-section-text}
## Variability and Whiplash

ADD
:::
:::

::: {.research-section}
![](images/processes.jpg)

::: {.research-section-text}
## Methods

ADD
:::
:::
